name: Bank Statement
description: Extract transactions, balances, and period from any bank format.
instructions:
Extract the following fields:

- bank_name (string)
- account_holder_name (string)
- account_number_last_four (string)
- iban (string)
- statement_period_start (date)
- statement_period_end (date)
- currency (string)
- opening_balance (number)
- closing_balance (number)
- transactions (array): each item has date, description, debit_amount, credit_amount, balance_after

Mark fields not present in the document as null.
